extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: AI-search-enabled Fenlight fork with TMDb-backed results.
extension.description: A standalone Fenlight fork that adds Gemini-powered natural-language search while keeping TMDb as the source of truth for displayed results.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v1.0.5]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses so AI Search can keep working when one project hits its cap.
[v1.0.4]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better literal title/franchise handling.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.46]: * Tighten playback-start validation so a source that only reaches a half-started state gets about 5 seconds of main startup plus a short grace settle before Fen retries the next candidate instead of treating started playback as automatically successful. * Keep the current hybrid handoff, and note that an intermittent Real-Debrid/Kodi teardown hang after stop() is still under investigation when a bad stream refuses to close quickly.
[v2.0.45]: * Strip tracker suffix noise like .rartv. and .eztv before release-group matching so season-pack sources such as S01 BiRDHOUSE rank above weaker same-quality fallbacks when their episode subtitle release matches.
[v2.0.44]: * Skip autoplay sources only when every detected audio stream is a blocked pirate-language track, so bad metadata cannot allow Russian-only/Chinese-only/Ukrainian-only sources and mixed-language sources with an acceptable track can still play.
[v2.0.43]: * Use the show's original or English title plus the actual episode name when building TV subtitle-search metadata and filenames, reducing mismatches on localized show labels.
[v2.0.42]: * Skip autoplay sources whose detected audio streams are Russian-only, Ukrainian-only, or Chinese-only unless the selected title metadata already expects that spoken language.
[v2.0.41]: * Add an explicit Trakt authorization status row to the settings window so expired or incomplete auth is visible even when a stale username is still stored. * Only show Authorize when Trakt is not fully authorized and keep Revoke tied to a stored Trakt user instead of treating the username as the only auth signal.
[v2.0.40]: * Demote bare generic movie-title subtitles to low-confidence fallbacks so structured release-specific matches can win when available. * Demote low-information source containment hits against structured DVDRip-style subtitles so malformed or ambiguous source names stop outranking stronger higher-quality matches.
[v2.0.39]: * Republished the TMDb metadata language and fallback-language controls under a higher production-safe test version.
[v2.0.38]: * Add TMDb metadata language and fallback-language settings for movie, TV, collection, episode, and people details. * Fill missing summaries from the configured fallback language instead of dropping back to English-only metadata requests.
[v2.0.37]: * Rebrand the patched add-on metadata under DutchTech so Kodi listings no longer show the upstream provider name for this repo build.
[v2.0.36]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses. * Expand the subtitle-backed retry pool to the best 10 selector-ranked candidates and let subtitle comments promote a stronger alias for the same subtitle item when they improve the release match.
[v2.0.35]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better title-like prompt handling.
[v2.0.34]: * Preserve meaningful technical bracket segments during bundled subtitle-selector normalization so release matching keeps cues like [1080p], codec tags, and year-style bracket tokens instead of discarding them as noise.
[v2.0.33]: * Add TMDb collection-search support for movie searches so matching collection results can open directly into the related movie-set listing.
[v2.0.32]: * Republish the same Gemini-backed AI Search test build under a higher test-only version so Kodi updates cleanly from the current production 2.0.31 release.
[v2.0.31]: * Add Gemini-backed AI Search inside Fen Light Patched so natural-language discovery can build TMDb-backed movie and TV result lists without leaving the patched addon. * Store AI Search history locally and expose a Gemini API key field in the existing settings manager.
[v2.0.30]: * Clear local Kodi bookmark rows using the real plugin:// playback URLs so erase-bookmark actions target the active movie or episode instead of relying on the old broad filename match.
[v2.0.28]: * Keep the smoother autoplay handoff that waits for fullscreen before closing the resolver window, reducing the flash back to the skin start screen. * Bridge selector playback metadata into Kodi properties so patched a4k can consume the exact selector-chosen subtitle for the active source at runtime. * Trim the successful pre-player settle before player.run(...) to reduce startup latency without changing retry timing.
[v2.0.26]: * Ship Fen Light Patched with reuse language invoker disabled by default so repo installs stop re-enabling it for setups that expect it off.
[v2.0.25]: * Refresh packaged branding and artwork so repo installs no longer reuse the old selector-test presentation.
[v2.0.24]: * Prefer direct subtitle filename evidence over uploader comments when both are available. * Strip OpenSubtitles track and language suffixes before source/subtitle matching.
[v2.0.23]: * Bundle the subtitle selector inside the add-on instead of depending on an external dev repo path. * Build the autoplay retry pool from one title-level subtitle gather and local selector ranking.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.description: TMDb Helper liefert Details über Filme, Fernsehsendungen und Schauspieler aus TMDb. Benutzer können auf eine Vielzahl von Listen aus TMDb TVDb MDbList und Trakt zugreifen.
TMDb Helper Patched provides details about movies, tvshows and actors from TMDb. Users can access a variety of lists from TMDb TVDb MDbList and Trakt.
TMDb Helper dostarcza szczegółowych informacji o filmach, serialach i aktorach z serwisu TMDb. Użytkownicy mają dostęp do szeregu list z serwisów TMDb, TVDb, MDbList i Trakt.
TMDb Helper tillhandahåller information om filmer, tv-serier och skådespelare från TMDb. Användare kan få tillgång till en mängd olika listor från TMDb, TVDb, MDbList och Trakt.
TMDb 助手从 TMDb（影视数据库） 获取电影、电视剧及演员的详细信息。用户可访问来自 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList 和 Trakt 的各类影视列表。
extension.disclaimer: Daten bereitgestellt von TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV und Trakt. Einige der Informationen werden von TheTVDB.com bereitgestellt. Bitte erwäge sie zu unterstützen. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data provided by TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV and Trakt. Some of the information is provided by TheTVDB.com. Please consider supporting them. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Dane dostarczane przez TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV i Trakt. Niektóre informacje pochodzą z serwisu TheTVDB.com. Prosimy o rozważenie wsparcia tych serwisów. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data tillhandahållen av TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV och Trakt. En del av informationen tillhandahålls av TheTVDB.com. Stöd dem gärna. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
数据由 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList、OMDb、FanartTV 和 Trakt 提供。部分信息由 TheTVDB.com 提供，建议您支持他们。订阅链接：https://thetvdb.com/subscribe

extension.summary: Sync selected Kodi data with Google Drive
extension.description: A background service add-on for syncing selected Kodi files and folders with Google Drive using OAuth refresh tokens.
extension.news:
v0.2.39 - Move full release history into CHANGELOG.md so repository metadata stays compact
v0.2.38 - Add multi-category sync targets for core data, skin widgets, addon settings backups, and custom file or folder paths
Full release history is now tracked in CHANGELOG.md.

extension.description: Multi-source subtitles addon optimized for Seren and a4kScrapers. Supports: OpenSubtitles, BSPlayer, Podnadpisi.NET, SubDL, Addic7ed
extension.news:
[v3.23.8]: * Move full release history into CHANGELOG.md so repository metadata stays compact.
[v3.23.7]: * Relax OpenSubtitles TV episode IMDb filtering in API-mode pre-play searches so valid episode subtitle results survive to Fenlight matching.
[v3.23.6]: * Add targeted search pipeline logging for API-mode pre-play debugging, including raw service results and each prepare/filter stage.
Full release history is now tracked in CHANGELOG.md.

extension.description: Multi-source subtitles addon optimized for Seren and a4kScrapers. Supports: OpenSubtitles, BSPlayer, Podnadpisi.NET, SubDL, Addic7ed
extension.news:
[v3.23.29]: * Search OpenSubtitles TV episodes by parent show IMDb id plus season/episode first, so numeric show titles like 1923 return the full episode subtitle set instead of a single broad title fallback.
[v3.23.28]: * Rebrand the patched add-on metadata under DutchTech so Kodi listings no longer show the upstream or placeholder provider name for this repo build.
[v3.23.26]: * Bypass the persisted subtitle-results cache during API-mode searches so Fenlight pre-play subtitle gathers always use a fresh subtitle result set instead of stale runtime cache state.
[v3.23.23]: * Consume Fenlight's selector-provided subtitle payload at runtime, keyed to the active playback source, before falling back to a fresh runtime search. * Speed up selector-backed startup attachment by fast-polling during the first playback seconds and trying the forced selector subtitle before the IMDb-gated fallback search. * On OpenSubtitles download 401, clear cached auth state, re-login once, and retry the same candidate so stale token failures recover automatically. * Shift movie OpenSubtitles retrieval toward IMDb-first searches with filename-year correction fallback so bad metadata years no longer suppress valid subtitle hits.
[v3.23.21]: * Prevent autoplay subtitle preparation from crashing when uploader comments contain Unicode digit separators such as ². * Rewrite matching-stem runtime subtitle temp filenames before attach so Kodi shows a readable external subtitle name instead of collapsing to generic (External).
[v3.23.20]: * Migrate the Kodi settings dialog to the current schema so provider toggles and account fields no longer reset while switching categories. * Restore selector shadow snapshots for multi-provider runs, including paired Fenlight source snapshots and history-only runtime/manual subtitle snapshots. * Make manual subtitle picks attach the real downloaded file directly so Kodi shows the chosen release name instead of TempSubtitle, without the old false failed-download notice.
[v3.23.19]: * Refresh packaged branding and artwork so repo installs no longer reuse the old selector-test presentation.
[v3.23.18]: * Add universal [AI]/[MT] badges to manual search subtitle rows so translated results are clearly marked across skins.
[v3.23.17]: * Prefer full OpenSubtitles release names for selector matching. * Keep API-mode settings overrides compatible with Kodi's read-only Addon object. * Refresh cached rows missing translation flags before selector ranking.
[v3.23.13]: * Fix comment-fallback ranking crash in final subtitle selection.
[v3.23.12]: * Use OpenSubtitles uploader comments as a fallback-only compatibility signal after direct filename matching.
[v3.23.11]: * Demote AI and machine-translated subtitle results during final ranking so they only win as fallback.
[v3.23.10]: * Move full release history into CHANGELOG.md so repository metadata stays compact.
[v3.23.9]: * Fix OpenSubtitles download retries and cleanup after failed downloads. * Improve subtitle ranking for prerelease and release-family mismatches. * Add resilient OpenSubtitles movie fallback search when year metadata is wrong. * Show a notification when an AI or machine translated subtitle is selected.
Full release history is now tracked in CHANGELOG.md.

extension.summary: Testing repository for DutchTech Kodi add-ons.
extension.description: Install this testing repository to receive DutchTech Kodi test add-on updates from a GitHub Pages-hosted source.
